title: Return Approved Notification
notes: Return status notification indicating seller has approved buyer's return request; seller has 2 business days to issue refund after delivery confirmation

title: Return Received Status
notes: Status notification when tracking confirms item was delivered back to seller's registered address; triggers 2 business day refund deadline

title: Return Requested Notification
notes: Email notification to Messages with subject line 'Send the item back' containing return request details and shipping deadline

title: Return Shipped Status
notes: Tracking notification for returned items; automatically updated when eBay-generated return label is printed; has experienced technical issues with tracking updates

title: Return to Sender Shipping
notes: Shipping status when package is returned to seller due to delivery failure; seller options include partial refund minus shipping or re-shipping to corrected address; USPS charges return postage equal to original shipping cost

title: Returns Accepted Search Filter
notes: Search refinement filter in left sidebar allowing buyers to narrow results to sellers who accept returns; essential for Top Rated Plus badge qualification which requires 30-day free returns

title: Revise Listing Tool
notes: Tool for editing active listings; analogous to Revise Your Item (RYI) page; restrictions apply based on listing type, bids received, and eBay policies; generally no charge except when adding enhancements like subtitles or second categories; cannot revise while active offer is pending

title: Rich Text Editor for Listings
notes: Basic editing mode for listing descriptions supporting limited HTML tags; allows toggling between Rich Text and HTML Editor modes; HTML Editor provides more flexibility for advanced formatting

title: Royal Mail Tracked 24 Delivery
notes: UK-wide next working day delivery service with SMS/email notification and signature on delivery; coverage up to £75; requires minimum 1,000 items per year for business account; integrated with eBay Click & Drop for automatic order import

title: Sales Events & Promotions
notes: Promotional tool allowing sellers to set and advertise discounts on product categories; created via Promotions Manager using 'Sale event + markdown' option; supports percentage or dollar amount discounts; part of broader promotions including volume pricing, shipping discounts, and accessory discounts

title: Save for Later Cart Feature
notes: Shopping cart feature allowing buyers to move items from active cart to separate list; located at bottom of shopping cart page; maximum 100 items; items can be added back to cart via 'Add back to cart' button; distinct from wishlist functionality

title: Saved Items & Collections
notes: General category for saved/favorited items including Watch List and Wish List; accessed via My eBay; includes saved searches, sellers, and feed; Watch List option preferred over Wish List which has experienced availability issues

title: Saved Drafts Listing Tool
notes: Incomplete listing storage feature; accessed via 'Complete Draft' in My eBay; drafts expire after 15-30 days though some persist 60+ days; known issue where active listings sometimes create drafts unintentionally; located under Sell page

title: Saved Payment Methods Wallet
notes: Payment wallet feature storing credit cards and payment options; managed via Account Settings > Payments > Manage payment methods; allows quick checkout without re-entering details; recent changes to PayPal integration now show generic 'PayPal' option instead of email address

title: Saved Seller Following
notes: Following feature allowing buyers to save/favorite sellers; replaced older 'favorite sellers' terminology; accessed via heart icon or 'Save seller' link in listings; followers see seller profile link in home page navigation and may receive feed updates about new collections; managed in My eBay > Saved Sellers

title: Schedule Start Time for Listings
notes: Feature allowing sellers to set future start date/time for listings; changed from 'Start immediately' to 'Schedule a start time' in Price section of Unified Listing Tool; uses Pacific Coast Time; requires fee; listing won't publish until scheduled time

title: Scheduled Listing Management
notes: Listing scheduling system allowing start up to 3 weeks in advance; all times shown in Pacific time; managed in My eBay with Reschedule and Delete options; daylight saving time handled automatically with full 24-hour listing periods

title: Search Filters & Refinements
notes: Search refinement system including MPN, UPC, EPID, EAN/ISBN codes, price ranges, listing formats, conditions, locations, and marketplaces; mobile app offers 'lockable filters'; dynamic category-specific filters; saved searches preserve filter settings via URL parameters; no permanent filter customization on desktop

title: Search Standing Dashboard
notes: Seller analytics dashboard for search visibility metrics; specific feature name not widely documented; likely part of Seller Hub analytics suite showing search ranking and visibility performance

title: Self-Hosted Images for Listings
notes: External image hosting option via File Exchange using web-hosted image URLs; cannot mix with EPS (eBay Picture Services) images; limited to 1 photo when mixing types; eBay began allowing up to 12 self-hosted images around 2012; error 20004 occurs when mixing image types

title: Seller Responded Notification
notes: Message notification status indicating seller has replied to buyer inquiry; part of eBay Messages system with threaded conversation grouping; messages sent to eBay Messages inbox and personal email

title: Selling Coach Tips & Training
notes: Third-party eBay seller training and coaching resources; provides actionable roadmap and personalized learning; blog offers tips including starting small, buying items for feedback first, using shipping scale, and focusing on higher-value categories like jackets, leather, and cashmere

title: Session Duration Analytics
notes: Website analytics metric; eBay averaged 11:43 (11 minutes 43 seconds) session duration in March 2026 with 5.83 pages per visit; significantly above typical e-commerce benchmark of 2-3 minutes; indicates detailed product research and comparison shopping behavior

title: Session Expired Security Timeout
notes: Security timeout notification after 10-30 minutes of inactivity; mobile app requires Android 10+ or iOS 17+; caused by unstable internet connections, disabled cookies, or browsing anonymously; may indicate attempted cybercrime triggering automatic logout

title: Shake to Search Mobile Feature
notes: Mobile app camera/visual search feature; limited public documentation; likely related to visual search functionality activated by shaking device; part of eBay's mobile shopping innovation

title: Ship to Store Pickup Option
notes: Delivery option allowing customers to ship purchases to nearby retail store for pickup; participating locations include CVS, Walgreens, Dollar General; often free service; notification sent when item arrives at store with several days pickup window

title: Shop by Diagram (eBay Motors)
notes: Interactive automotive parts shopping via visual schematics; proprietary technology searches millions of parts matching diagram for vehicle; fitment technology guarantees compatibility with year/make/model; launched August 2018 for North America desktop and mobile web; addresses problem where 50% of consumers mistakenly purchase incompatible parts

title: Shopping Updates Notifications
notes: Personalized notification feed about items of interest, ending listings, offers made, cart changes; includes 'Related to recent purchase', 'Recently viewed', and 'Just for you' recommendations; managed via My eBay > Settings > Notifications > Shopping Updates; delivered via app, email, or SMS

title: Show Only Search Filter
notes: Search filter section in left menu of search results; includes options for Sold items (past 90 days), Items listed as lots, and other refinements; helps buyers customize search to find specific criteria

title: Similar Items Recommendations
notes: Machine learning recommendation system showing 'Similar Sponsored Items' based on seed item; relevance cascade model filters candidates by title, appearance, brand, price; 'Find Similar' button uses image recognition on seller photos; 2.14% increase in purchase-to-recommendation ratio; controversial among sellers as directs buyers to competing listings

title: Simple Delivery (UK)
notes: Mandatory managed shipping for UK private sellers starting April 15, 2025; streamlines postage with automatic label generation based on buyer location, parcel size, service level; prepaid labels and QR codes; Royal Mail and Evri carriers by default; eligible items £750 or less for UK and Channel Islands domestic delivery only; exemptions for items £20 or under in certain categories and oversized items

title: Spotlight Deals Featured Promotions
notes: Featured daily deal showcasing one item at exceptional price; part of broader promotional offerings including Daily Deals and Trending Deals; all items include free shipping; complemented by Featured Deals section with up to 90% markdowns across all categories

title: Spring Clearance Seasonal Event
notes: Seasonal clearance sales typically occurring 2 months into spring (May); retailers clear winter stock to make room for spring merchandise; no specific eBay-branded 'Spring Clearance' event documented; eBay offers various seasonal promotions throughout year

title: Unique Visitors Analytics
notes: Traffic report metric tracking individual visitors to listings; part of free eBay seller analytics including page views, popular listings, search keywords; helps sellers understand store performance and optimize listings; available in Seller Hub traffic reports

title: Unread Messages Notification
notes: Message inbox indicator showing number in brackets on Messages tab; messages sent to eBay Messages inbox and personal email; known issues with persistent '1' unread count in Seller Hub; new messaging experience groups messages in threaded conversations; filterable by member messages or eBay messages

title: VAT Services for UK/EU Sellers
notes: Tax collection and remittance service for UK and EU cross-border transactions; eBay acts as deemed supplier for certain transactions; integrates with Import One-Stop Shop (IOSS) system for EU VAT compliance; handles VAT on behalf of sellers

title: Views Listing Analytics
notes: Page view metric counting when someone views listing on eBay website or mobile app; for fixed price listings active 30+ days, count is rolling 30-day (not cumulative lifetime); eBay filters bot traffic with secondary daily analysis; distinct from impressions (times seen in search results); viewable in Active/Unsold pages in app, My eBay, Seller Hub Performance tab; recent technical issues with missing organic stats starting October 2025

title: Visitor Counter for Listings
notes: Optional listing counter feature showing view count; styles include basic, retro-computer, hidden; added via 'Visitor counter section' in listing form; not available in quick listing tool; File Exchange header field 'HitCounter' with values NoHitCounter, HonestyStyle, GreenLED, Hidden, BasicStyle, RetroStyle, HiddenStyle; counter removed when item ends; eBay shows view counts at top of listings

title: Visits Traffic Metric
notes: Total number of visits to eBay Store pages; key metric in Seller Hub traffic analytics; Store traffic reports track total visits or narrow to paid visits from Promoted Display ads; part of traffic report including unique visitors, page views, popular listings, search keywords; Analytics API returns buyer traffic details; recent changes to Traffic reports raised transparency concerns with sellers noting lack of critical information and granularity

title: Visual Editor for Listing Templates
notes: WYSIWYG editor for listing descriptions converting to HTML; toggle between visual and HTML mode; complex templates may display incorrectly in Visual mode with external styles not shown; visual editor can remove template parts; third-party platforms (Salestio, 3Dsellers, Linnworks) offer enhanced visual editing; editing existing HTML via WYSIWYG can corrupt original code

title: WATA Grading Video Game Authentication
notes: Video game authentication and grading service evaluating physical condition and authenticity; numerical grade 1-10 in 0.5 increments (1-9) and 0.2 increments (9-10) for game condition; letter grade C to A++ for factory seal condition; detailed reports on box, manual, cartridge; eBay hosts dedicated WATA-graded shop; WATA became PSA (Professional Sports Authenticator) in September 2025; provides encapsulation protecting from damage and environmental exposure

title: Watch Count Analytics
notes: Measure of listing popularity showing number of watchers; sellers see count in Watcher column on active listings page; watcher identities kept anonymous; third-party tools (WatchCount.com, Wuanto.com) provide detailed analytics including number of watchers, pricing, quantity, sales velocity, seller info; useful for competitive analysis and pricing strategy; lowering price by 5%+ triggers automatic notification to watchers; watch count visible when exceeds 5 watchers

title: Watch This Item Button
notes: Button/link to add items to watchlist; located underneath purchase options on item details page; can be enabled in search results via View dropdown > Customize > 'Watch This Item' Link checkbox; triggers notifications for listing changes (price, stock, details) and ending soon alerts; notifications controllable via Communication preferences in My eBay

title: Watchers Count Listing Metric
notes: Number of eBay shoppers who added listing to watch-list; watchers notified for every change until listing ends; viewable in Seller Hub, mobile app, Active Listing page (5th column); aggregate metrics only, individual watcher IDs kept private; distinct from views (impressions); count displayed when exceeds 5; eBay testing different display approaches to optimize sales

title: Winning Notice Auction Notification
notes: Notification sent to auction winners confirming successful bid; part of eBay's buyer notification system; alerts buyer to complete purchase and pay for won item; critical for auction-style listing completion
